backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two mobile layout alignment fixes targeting Android content centering issues and responsive CSS improvements across multiple frontend files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, and utilities describing the Zerox AI website structure with responsive design, 3D elements, chatbot, pricing, and content sections.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag configured for mobile responsiveness and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home, Features, Pricing, Demo, and Contact pages, wrapped in dark theme provider.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotW: Floating chatbot widget with glassmorphism UI, responsive sizing for mobile, message history, and intent-based FAQ responses.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/faq.ts: FAQ database with keyword-based entries covering Zerox AI features, pricing, payment, support, podcast, and portfolio with priority scoring.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/intentMa: Intent matching algorithm that scores user messages against FAQ keywords to return the best matching response.
frontend/src/components/features/Feature: Glassmorphism feature card component displaying icon, title, and description with hover effects and glow animations.
frontend/src/components/pricing/FreeTier: Modal dialog for free trial acquisition offering WhatsApp and phone contact options with gradient styling.
frontend/src/components/pricing/PaymentS: Displays a payment form with UPI QR code, copyable UPI ID, transaction ID input, and a button to verify payment via WhatsApp message.
frontend/src/components/pricing/PricingP: Renders three pricing plan cards (Free Trial, Lifetime Access, Student Plan) with features, pricing, and action buttons that scroll to payment or open a modal.
frontend/src/components/sections/AudioWa: Displays an animated audio wave image with pulse animation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Explore: A call-to-action card section that links to the Jolly Tech Beacons page with a gradient button.
frontend/src/components/sections/Podcast: A promotional card section for The Jolly Podcast with an audio wave visualization and external link button.
frontend/src/components/site/BrandMark.t: Displays the Jolly Tech - Zerox AI logo image.
frontend/src/components/site/Motion.tsx: A wrapper component that applies intersection-observer-based animation effects (fade, slide, scale) with accessibility support for reduced motion preferences.
Main layout component with fixed header navigation, mobile menu, footer with social links, and chatbot widget integration.
frontend/src/components/three/FloatingFe: Renders six animated wireframe cubes in 3D space using Three.js with rotation and floating animations.
frontend/src/components/three/NeuralNetw: Creates an animated 3D neural network visualization with connected nodes and lines using Three.js, responsive to mouse movement.
frontend/src/components/three/ThreeCanva: Wrapper component for Three.js Canvas with performance optimizations based on reduced motion and low power mode preferences.
frontend/src/components/three/ZeroxCoreS: React Three Fiber component rendering an interactive 3D sphere with three orbiting rings, featuring drag-to-rotate controls, auto-rotation, and animated ring movements with glowing cyan/blue/purple materials.
frontend/src/content/zeroxFeatures.ts: Exports an array of 20+ Zerox AI feature definitions, each with a title, description, and Lucide icon, covering voice control, AI conversation, computer vision, automation, messaging, and plugin capabilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLowPowerMode.ts: Hook that detects low-power devices by checking device memory, CPU cores, and mobile user agents to enable performance optimizations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file with a comment indicating the backend has no functionality and all data is static.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: Hook that detects user's prefers-reduced-motion media query preference and returns a boolean to conditionally disable animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom dark futuristic theme using cyan/blue/purple neon colors, glassmorphism utilities, glow effects, and accessibility support for reduced motion.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page component displaying WhatsApp support information with a call-to-action button and additional contact method icons in a glassmorphic card layout.
frontend/src/pages/DemoPage.tsx: Demo page component that displays a call-to-action card for users to request a free Zerox AI demo via WhatsApp, featuring gradient backgrounds, feature highlights, and a button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message.
frontend/src/pages/FeaturesPage.tsx: Features page component that displays an embedded Instagram reel and a grid of feature cards showcasing Zerox AI capabilities, with 3D floating cubes background and motion animations.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component with hero section featuring 3D neural network backgrounds, main CTA buttons for exploring features/pricing, and sections for podcasts and additional content exploration.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Pricing page component that displays pricing plans and payment section with animated motion effects and gradient text headings.
frontend/src/utils/clipboard.ts: Utility function for copying text to clipboard with fallback support for older browsers using the deprecated execCommand API.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Utility function that generates WhatsApp web links with pre-filled messages by encoding the message text and formatting the phone number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes (including neon accents), container settings, border radius variables, box shadows with glow effects, font families, and animation keyframes for the design system.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a mobile Android layout alignment bug where content is shifted right, with two feature requests focused on fixing responsive CSS and ensuring proper centering on mobile devices.
